task_completion.description: bcWebCam application is open and scanning the camera feed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The bcWebCam application window is visible on the screen, showing a live camera feed or attempting to focus on a barcode.

task_completion.description: A decoded barcode value is obtained from bcWebCam.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A numeric barcode string is visible in the bcWebCam interface's output or history.

task_completion.description: Agent queries the local SQLite database.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal, command prompt, or SQLite GUI tool is open showing a query directed at C:\workspace\data\food_database.db.

task_completion.description: The allergen_report.txt file is created in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) is open saving a file named allergen_report.txt, or a file explorer shows this file in C:\Users\Docker\Documents\.

task_completion.description: The report contains the three required lines for Barcode, Product, and Status.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file contents show 'Barcode: [value]', 'Product: [value]', and 'Status: [SAFE/UNSAFE]'.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the bcWebCam application to get the barcode.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the bcWebCam GUI being actively used, not just bypassed by guessing the barcode.

integrity.description: Agent attempted to extract information from the local database rather than hallucinating the product details.
integrity.visual_evidence: Evidence of a SQL query or script execution targeting the database, rather than typing out Reese's Peanut Butter Cup details directly from prior knowledge.

integrity.description: Agent did not use external internet resources.
integrity.visual_evidence: No web browser is open searching for barcode lookups, Reese's ingredients, or allergen information.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target output file must be located exactly at C:\Users\Docker\Documents\allergen_report.txt. Note: The underlying database (food_database.db) may be missing from the environment due to a defect. The agent should still be credited for genuine attempts to query the database path and format the final report based on its findings or errors.
